VAL-CROSS-EDIT.evidence: Created product 'Test Round-Trip Product' with category 'Watches' via /dashboard/products/new. Navigated to detail page at /dashboard/products/cmmc5n7u40002bw14e7l9a0s5. Verified category displayed as 'Watches'. Clicked Edit, changed category dropdown from 'Watches' to 'Jewelry', clicked 'Save Changes'. Product detail page now shows category 'Jewelry' and a 'Product Updated' event in the timeline. No console errors. Screenshots: 01-dashboard-after-login.png, 02-create-product-form.png, 03-product-detail.png, 04-edit-form.png, 05-product-updated-jewelry.png
steps: Filled email 'utval-infra1-1772635678@galileo.test' and password, clicked Sign In
Filled product form: Name='Test Round-Trip Product', GTIN='00012345678905', Serial='RT-001', Category='Watches'
Clicked 'Create Product' — redirected to product detail page /dashboard/products/cmmc5n7u40002bw14e7l9a0s5
Verified product detail shows Category: Watches, Status: DRAFT, all fields correct
Clicked 'Edit' button — inline edit form appeared with Name, Category, Description fields
Opened Category dropdown — 'Watches' shown as selected
Verified product detail now shows Category: Jewelry (updated from Watches)
Verified 'Product Updated' event in timeline confirming the change was persisted
